steps.title: Add another security measure
steps.content: The first sentence says Franklin took steps to prevent counterfeiting, such as weaving blue threads and muscovite into his paper. The next sentence introduces sage-leaf imprints as another separate anti-counterfeiting technique, so the transition needs to add to the previous information.

steps.title: Choose an additive transition
steps.content: The relationship is addition, not specificity, example, or contrast. B and C would make the imprinting seem like a narrower example of weaving threads and muscovite, even though it is a separate measure. D would signal contrast, but both sentences describe ways Franklin combated counterfeit notes. The answer is A.
